commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an English/zh-CN setup wizard catalog, locale detection and persistence via `cli.locale`/`OPENCLAW_LOCALE`, localized setup/finalization copy, config docs/help/schema updates, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of PR head is enough to reproduce the remaining review issues: zh-CN is resolved before setup continues, but the security acknowledgement still uses English constants and the quickstart summary still interpolates English formatter values.
commands.review_followup: External feature PR has insufficient actual setup proof, dirty merge state, and a new public config surface needing maintainer review, so the next step is contributor/maintainer follow-up rather than an autonomous repair lane.
